# NSURLErrorFailingURLStringErrorKey

The corresponding value is an [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSString] object for the URL which caused a load to fail. This key is only present in the [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/NSURLErrorDomain].
title: NSURLErrorFailingURLStringErrorKey
